subject: A multi-limbed Eldrazi creature with a central glowing maw, surrounded by debris and dark wing-like forms against a bright sky
description: The image centers on a chaotic, multi-limbed Eldrazi creature with pale yellow-gray limbs radiating outward like a star or mantis. Its central mass is dominated by a glowing multicolored maw — a radiant opening that burns with pinks, blues, and whites — flanked by reddish horn-like protrusions. Large black irregular shapes — wings, debris, or void-fragments — arc around the top of the frame against a bright cloud-streaked sky. The composition reads as an explosion or rupture outward: the creature appears to be consuming or expelling energy. No humanoid figure is present. The scale and chaos of the piece are its primary visual statement.
foreground: central Eldrazi body with glowing multicolored maw and radiating limbs
background: black void-fragments against bright clouds and sky
